title: Old Soren
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:OldSoren-Polyhedron165.png|thumb|right|250px|Old Soren]]
'''Old Soren''' was an [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on the penal colony [[Ord Vaxal]].

During the jailbreak 20 years prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the entire spaceport was blasted to rubble by [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] ships in orbit to keep the inmates of Ord Vaxal's prisons from escaping. Afterward, the city of [[Tof Soren]] sprang up around the ruins of Old Soren, while the northern rim eventually became the location of the [[Oubliette (shadowport)|Oubliette]] [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]].
